# mongo-migrate-kit

> Production-grade MongoDB migration toolkit for Node.js and TypeScript. Run a single migration file,
> roll back any batch or the last N, preview with dry-run, wrap migrations in transactions, verify
> file checksums, and run safely behind a native MongoDB concurrency lock — via the `mmk` CLI or a
> fully-typed programmatic API. A drop-in alternative to migrate-mongo, with one-command import of an
> existing migrate-mongo changelog.

Key facts:
- Package (npm): `mongo-migrate-kit` — install with `npm install mongo-migrate-kit mongodb`
- CLI binary: `mmk`
- Requires Node.js >= 18 and MongoDB >= 5.0; supports TypeScript, ESM, and CommonJS
- License: MIT
- Repository: https://github.com/guptasantosh327/mongo-migrate-kit

## Guide

- [Why mongo-migrate-kit?](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/why): Reasons to choose it and how it compares to migrate-mongo
- [Core Concepts](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/concepts): Migrations, batches, the changelog, ordering, locking, and checksums
- [Getting Started](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/getting-started): Install, configure, create, and run your first migration
- [Tutorial](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/tutorial): End-to-end worked example from init to rollback
- [Configuration](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/configuration): Config file, env vars, precedence, and all options
- [Writing Migrations](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/writing-migrations): The up/down contract in TypeScript, ESM, and CommonJS
- [Transactions](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/transactions): Opt-in MongoDB transactions per file or globally
- [Lifecycle Hooks](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/hooks): beforeAll, afterAll, beforeEach, afterEach, onError
- [Programmatic API](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/api): The MigratorKit class, methods, and result types
- [CI/CD & Deployment](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/ci-cd): GitHub Actions, Docker, deploy gates, and JSON output
- [Troubleshooting](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/troubleshooting): Common errors and how to fix them
- [Migrating from migrate-mongo](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/migrate-mongo): Adopt an existing migrate-mongo changelog
- [FAQ](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/guide/faq): Common questions about running MongoDB migrations

## Commands

- [mmk up](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/up): Run all pending migrations, or a single file
- [mmk down](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/down): Roll back the last batch, a batch, the last N, or a file
- [mmk redo](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/redo): Roll back then re-apply a migration
- [mmk status & list](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/status): Inspect migration state; --check gates CI
- [mmk create & init](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/create): Scaffold migrations and generate a config
- [mmk dry-run](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/dry-run): Preview up/down without touching the database
- [mmk import](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/import): Adopt a migrate-mongo changelog (forward-only)
- [mmk unlock](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/commands/unlock): Force-release a stuck concurrency lock

## Reference

- [CLI Cheatsheet](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/reference/cli): Every command and flag on one page
- [Error Codes](https://mongo-migrate-kit.vercel.app/reference/error-codes): All error codes, classes, causes, and fixes
